report_summary:
**DONE: Interasia Energy Pte. Ltd., SG — Risk: 4 REVIEW — OFAC name match risk (Interasia Trading Group HK); opaque ownership; Mongolia/Russia indirect exposure; HudsonRock infostealer hit; capital corrected SGD 5.46M; no direct sanctions hits**

---

## 📋 CIR: INTERASIA ENERGY PTE. LTD.
`interasia_energy_pte_ltd_SG_20260505.json` → `osint-staging/americas/`

*Synthesised from: China node CIR (2026-05-04) + Dark web sweeps (22 + 60 findings) + direct registry/web research*

---

### 🏢 Workstream 1A — Corporate Registry

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| UEN | **201733771N** |
| Former Name | **CLIFF CAPITAL PARTNERS PTE. LTD.** |
| Status | Live Company (ACRA) |
| Incorporated | 23 November 2017 |
| Registered Address | 3 Coleman St #03-24, Peninsula Shopping Complex — **virtual office shared by 466 companies** |
| Legal Form | Exempt Private Company Limited by Shares |
| Activity | Wholesale of fuels (SSIC 46541); non-ferrous metals |
| Paid-up Capital | **SGD 5,462,900** *(corrected — China node CIR had incorrect SGD 100)* |
| Officers | 8 (per companies.sg) |
| Website | interasiaenergy.com (active; 44 SSL certs issued) |

---

### 👥 Workstream 2A — Ownership & UBO

| Name | Role | PEP | Sanctions |
|---|---|---|---|
| **GABRIELE MURRONI** | Director / GM / Secretary / **100% UBO (reported)** | NOT PEP | CLEAR |
| **Pierre-Yves Rigaux** | CEO & Founder | NOT PEP | CLEAR |
| **Quentin Herbrecht** | Founder (unconfirmed) | NOT PEP | CLEAR |
| **Mike Henry** | Listed as CEO — ⚠️ **likely data error** (BHP CEO) | — | — |

**Murroni parallel entities** (related-party risk):
- **Far East Commodities SA** (Geneva) — Chairman; USD 301M turnover FY2023; coal, kerosene, biofuels
- **Far East Commodities Pte Ltd** (Singapore) — Director; USD 1M shareholder loan from Murroni

> ⚠️ Paid ACRA extract required to confirm UBO and full officer list.

---

### 🚨 Workstream 3A — Sanctions

| Screen | Result |
|---|---|
| Interasia Energy Pte. Ltd. | ✅ NO HIT |
| Gabriele Murroni | ✅ NO HIT |
| Pierre-Yves Rigaux | ✅ NO HIT |

**🔴 CRITICAL — Name similarity flag:**
> **"Interasia Trading Group Limited" (Hong Kong)** — previously designated by OFAC for **Russian technology sector involvement**. Near-identical brand name to subject entity. Legally distinct (different jurisdiction, different CR). Mandatory written denial of affiliation required before transaction.

**🟡 Indirect exposure:** Mongolia fuel supply — 95–97% Russian-origin structurally. Company claims Korea/China/ME sourcing — supply chain docs required.

---

### 📰 Workstream 4A — Adverse Media

| # | Severity | Finding |
|---|---|---|
| AM-001 | 🔴 HIGH | Virtual office (466 co-tenants) + former generic name "Cliff Capital Partners" + unverified USD 200M+ turnover |
| AM-002 | 🔴 HIGH | Name similarity to OFAC-sanctioned Interasia Trading Group (HK) |
| AM-003 | 🟡 MEDIUM | Trafigura Mongolia $1.1B fraud (2024) — CEO Rigaux's former employer; no personal involvement alleged |
| AM-004 | 🟡 MEDIUM | Murroni's interlocking Far East Commodities SA/SG directorships — related-party risk |

|---|---|---|
| **HudsonRock Cavalier** | `interasiaenergy.com` in infostealer database | 🟡 MEDIUM |

### 📌 Open Items

| Priority | Item |
|---|---|
| 🔴 **CRITICAL** | Written denial of affiliation with OFAC-sanctioned Interasia Trading Group (HK) |
| 🔴 **HIGH** | Paid ACRA extract — confirm all directors, shareholders, UBO (Murroni 100%?) |
| 🔴 **HIGH** | Mongolia supply chain docs — fuel origin countries, counterparty list |
| 🔴 **HIGH** | KYC: Murroni (passport, SOW, Far East Commodities relationship) + Rigaux |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | Audited financials FY2023/24 (verify USD 200M+ claim) |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | Confirm Mongolian oil terminal ownership/registration |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | Clarify Mike Henry CEO attribution (likely data error) |
| 🟢 LOW | Notify counterparty of infostealer exposure; request credential audit |

**Recommendation: REVIEW — Do not proceed without completing CRITICAL and HIGH items.** The formal affiliation denial re: OFAC-sanctioned Interasia Trading Group (HK) is non-negotiable before any transaction.
